# MOCCA Copilot Instructions

Follow the repository source of truth in `AGENTS.md`.

For Android CLI, Android Knowledge Base, Android skills, Gradle, Compose Multiplatform, emulator, or Maestro work, use `.agents/skills/mocca-android-agent-workflow/SKILL.md`.

When `android` is not visible on `PATH`, run Android CLI through:

```powershell
powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "C:\Users\ruzaq\AndroidStudioProjects\MOCCA\scripts\android-cli.ps1"
```

Before changing Android platform APIs, AGP/Gradle behavior, Compose, Navigation, R8, Play Billing, edge-to-edge, emulator automation, or performance guidance, query Android Knowledge Base with `android docs search` and fetch the relevant `kb://` result.
